description: Comprehensive ERP & Project Management System for Construction / Engineering

tech_stack.frontend: React, Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui

features: AI-Powered Master Analysis with Multi-Department Reports (Commercial, Risk, PM, etc.)
Smart BOQ Extractor (Lump Sum format: Sections & Items)
Auto-Correction of metadata (Employer, Value, Dates) from Contract Text

rules_and_conventions: Always use Arabic (ar) for user-facing UI and date formatting unless otherwise specified.
Maintain clean and premium aesthetics (gradients, shadows, responsive layouts).
Keep API keys (Groq/Gemini) in localStorage as fallback or environment variables.
Ensure RLS (Row Level Security) considerations in Supabase when querying data.
